scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); for (const text of ['clarification_request','product_item','filter_recovery_options','ws://127.0.0.1:18080/ws/chat','/health','statIntent','statLlm','eventSeq']) { if (!html.includes(text)) throw new Error('missing '+text); } console.log('static client check passed');"
